name: Arrested Hymn
descs: Combat Start: if all enemies (or all Abnormality parts) have [Laceration], all allies gain 1 [Agility] next turn.
Combat Start: if all enemies (or all Abnormality parts) have [Laceration], all allies gain 1 [Agility] and 1 [AttackDmgUp] next turn.
Combat Start: if all enemies (or all Abnormality parts) have [Laceration], all allies gain 2 [Agility], 1 [AttackDmgUp], and 2 [AttackUp] next turn.
